lines: rebuild = "if [ -e /etc/NIXOS ]; then sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake .; else nix run home-manager -- switch --flake .; fi";

-      rebuild-dev = "if [ -e /etc/NIXOS ]; then sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake . --override-input klaus path:$HOME/hack/klaus; else nix run home-manager -- switch --flake . --override-input klaus path:$HOME/hack/klaus; fi";

input.command:
git add home/dev.nix && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Remove rebuild-dev shell alias

Klaus now handles the update pipeline to cosmo directly, making this
alias unnecessary.
EOF
)"
